zh.lifeSummary: Joan Bagot是Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley和Christiana Mauveslin的女兒，出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾。她於1260年與Roger Coningsby在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾莫頓 巴格特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1330年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾莫頓 巴格特。

nameMeanings.name: Bagot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Baggett   (see also   Baggott  ), from a pet form of   Bagg   2.

variants.name: Baggett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Norman personal name Bagot, a diminutive of ancient Germanic Bago, from the root bag- ‘to fight’. Compare Bagg 2.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Joan Bagot was born in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley and Christiana Mauveslin. She married Roger Coningsby in 1260, in Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1330, in Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Bagot est née à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley et Christiana Mauveslin. Elle a épousé Roger Coningsby en 1260, à Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Morton Bagot, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan BagotはイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでSir Richard Bagot, Lord of BromleyとChristiana Mauveslinの娘として生まれた。1260年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアモートン バゴトでRoger Coningsbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1330年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアモートン バゴトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bagot(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley(와)과 Christiana Mauveslin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 모르턴 바고트에서 Roger Coningsby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 모르턴 바고트에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Bagot родилась в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir Richard Bagot, Lord of Bromley и Christiana Mauveslin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Coningsby в 1260 г. в местности мортон багот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности мортон багот, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
